title: Pinboard Theme Tokens v1
description: Token dictionary for the Pinboard Theme Surface spec. Required slots cover every surface referenced by manifest.json; extension namespaces (fx/motion/assets/ext) are open for richer themes. Any theme that supplies the required slots can be composed by any composer.

id.description: Stable slug; used as CSS class hook and registry key.

mode.description: Hint for UA color-scheme + selection fallbacks.

family.description: Optional family key for grouping variants (e.g. 'flexoki', 'solarized').

layout.description: Composer selection + layout-scoped knobs. `mode` picks which composer renders the theme.

mode.description: Determines the composer used to emit CSS. Themes may still override individual surfaces via `overrides`.

right-bar.description: How P3 rightbar-heavy templates render the sidebar.

palette.description: Color slots. Required slots below MUST be provided; any additional slot is allowed and may be referenced by composers or overrides.

muted.description: Secondary / meta text (bookmark.meta, action.destroy, sub_banner counters).

border.description: Hairlines: bookmark separator, table dividers, input borders.

accent.description: Link + interactive emphasis (a, banner brand, tweet_searchbox submit).

accent-alpha.description: Transparent accent for focus ring / halo (e.g. rgba(accent, 0.25)).

private-bg.description: Background for items marked private (inline quirk `background:#fff1f1`).

selection-bg.description: ::selection background. Must pass AA vs selection-fg.

row-hover.description: tr[onmouseover] hover — overrides Pinboard's inline yellow.

border-strong.description: Optional: emphasized divider. Defaults to border.

link-hover.description: Optional: link hover. Defaults to accent.

link-visited.description: Optional: visited link. Defaults to accent.

focus-ring.description: Optional: focus outline. Defaults to accent.

unit.description: Base spacing unit; e.g. '4px'. Composers may derive scaled values.

radius.description: Optional. Composers fall back to 0 if absent.

border.description: Optional border descriptors. Composers default to '1px solid {palette.border}'.

hairline.description: Shorthand for bookmark separator; defaults to '1px dotted {palette.border}' to honor the 12/13-page inline quirk.

fx.description: Optional visual effects namespace (shadows, blur, gradients, glow). Consumed by composers that opt in.

motion.description: Optional motion tokens. Composers should default to instant transitions if absent.

assets.description: Optional static asset URLs (background images, custom glyphs). Prefer data: URIs or same-origin paths.

states.description: Optional per-state overrides. Keys match manifest `state_hooks`. Values are partial palette/typo deltas.

patterns.description: Stylistic / personality patterns. Each key is a named design decision the composer knows how to emit. Values are enum strings or short literal strings (for prefix glyphs). A theme that sets no patterns falls back to plain composer output.

tag-style.description: Visual treatment of a.tag. plain=composer default, hash-prefix=prepend '#', pill=rounded chip with padding, bracketed=wrap in [ ].

bookmark-title-prefix.description: Literal glyph(s) prepended to a.bookmark_title via ::before (e.g. '> ' for terminal).

heading-prefix.description: Literal glyph(s) prepended to .settings_heading via ::before (e.g. '$ ' for terminal).

url-link-style.description: Treatment of a.url_link. capsule=rounded bg chip (default), pill=fully-rounded, underline=no bg+underline, plain=no chrome.

private-badge.description: How .private is visually marked. Default: warm private-bg background + 3px inset accent shadow on left (no border, no layout shift). inset-bar=explicit alias for default. border-left=DEPRECATED (maps to inset-bar; was border-left which conflicts with hover-effect left-bar and looks harsh in dark). tint-bg=background tint only. dashed=dashed outline. stripe=diagonal stripe.

focus-ring.description: Focus outline style on inputs. thin-solid=1px accent ring (default), glow=soft box-shadow halo, dashed=dashed outline, none=no ring.

shape.description: Macro over radii. sharp=0 everywhere, rounded=use radius.md token, pill=use radius.pill token. Overrides individual radius tokens if set.

density.description: Macro over spacing. compact=tight padding+gaps, default=composer baseline, roomy=extra breathing room.

hover-effect.description: DEPRECATED — all bookmark row hover effects removed. Background/border changes distract reading. Title hover is handled by the composer (a.bookmark_title:hover). Card themes use card-shadow for subtle elevation.

row-divider.description: Separator between bookmark rows. hairline=1px solid border (default), dashed=1px dashed, left-accent=3px accent stripe on left instead of bottom rule, none=no divider.

heading-accent.description: Extra treatment on .settings_heading. plain=composer default, caps=uppercase+letter-spacing+smaller font (editorial), dashed-underline=dashed bottom rule instead of solid.

card-shadow.description: box-shadow on .bookmark rows. Only takes effect when bookmark-style is 'card'. soft=subtle lift, strong=pronounced drop shadow.

blockquote-style.description: Left border treatment on .description blockquote. left-accent=border colored by palette.accent (high-signal), left-muted=palette.border (subtle). Width via ext.blockquote-border-width (default 3px).

banner-chrome.description: Treatment of top #banner. rounded=border-radius + padding, card=rounded + bg-surface + bottom border + soft shadow. Radius via ext.banner-radius (default 4px for rounded, 8px for card).

title-weight.description: Override a.bookmark_title font-weight. normal=400, medium=500, semibold=600, bold=700. Overrides typo.weight-heading for this surface only.

tag-size.description: Font size for a.tag. small=typo.size-xs (fallback 12px). default=composer baseline.

button-style.description: Chrome of input[type=submit|button]. flat=strip native border only, outlined=transparent bg + 1px border (ghost), rounded=radius only (keeps composer border, uses ext.button-radius default 4px), flat-rounded=border:none + rounded radius, pill=borderless + fully-rounded + extra padding. default=composer baseline.

footer-tone.description: Tone for #footer, .colophon, .colophon a, .rss_link. muted=muted-soft color, faint=muted-soft + 0.75 opacity. default=composer baseline.

edit-form-surface.description: Treatment of #edit_bookmark_form, #bulk_top_bar, #bulk_edit_box. panel=bg-surface + 1px border, card=panel + ext.edit-form-radius (default 12px). default=composer baseline.

sort-order-style.description: Treatment of a.sort_order_selected (active sort chip). tinted=accent-alpha bg, accent-bg=accent-alpha bg + accent text, surface=bg-surface (neutral). default=composer baseline.

searchbox-style.description: Unified chrome for the four search inputs (#search_query_field, #banner_searchbox input, #right_bar input#key, #tweet_searchbox #search_query_field). boxed=bg-surface + 1px border + radius (ext.searchbox-radius, default 4px) + focus halo. outlined-accent=boxed + focus shifts border-color to accent. minimal=strip border/bg for a flat look. default=composer baseline.

sort-table-style.description: Admin bookmark-sort table at #main_column form[name="sort"]. enabled=style the rank input (38px fixed width, 12px font, 600 weight, bg-surface + border + radius) and tint tr:hover with accent-alpha. Radius via ext.sort-input-radius (falls back to ext.searchbox-radius, else 3px). default=composer baseline.

tag-hover-style.description: Extra emphasis on a.tag:hover, layered on top of composer's accent-alpha background. underline=text-decoration underline, accent-text=shift color to accent, underline-accent=both. default=composer baseline (bg only).

tag-selected-style.description: Color treatment of a.tag.selected (active filter chip). accent=color shifts to accent (keeps composer's bold). accent-soft=accent + normal weight. bold-accent=accent + explicit 600 weight (crisp for serif/mono themes). default=composer baseline (destroy color + bold).

overrides.description: Escape hatch: surface-keyed CSS rule fragments emitted verbatim AFTER the composer output. Use sparingly for bespoke surfaces the composer cannot express. Keys MUST match a surface id in manifest.json.

additionalProperties.description: Map of `&[:state]` -> CSS declarations string (without braces).

ext.description: Open namespace for theme-specific tokens that composers may read by agreement. No schema enforcement.

color.description: Any CSS <color>: hex, rgb()/rgba(), hsl()/hsla(), oklch(), color(), named, or var().
